## Mustache.MustacheTemplate.extractVariableNames() method

Extracts unique variable names from the template.

**Signature:**

```typescript
extractVariableNames(): readonly string[];
```
**Returns:**

readonly string\[\]

An array of unique variable name strings (e.g., \['user.name', 'items'\])
